subject: english
chapter_title: Toys and Games (Picture Reading) (Toys and Games)

main_sections.title: Toys and Games (Picture Reading)
main_sections.picture_story_summary: A lively outdoor scene shows children and adults engaged in various activities in front of homes. Several children play traditional games: boys are crouching on the ground playing marbles, a girl is playing hopscotch on a chalked grid, a boy and a girl are spinning tops, a boy is blindfolded (playing blind man's buff), and another boy holds a kite. A girl is reading a newspaper. Women sit on the doorstep engaged in household activities — one appears to be making a garland and another is sorting something. An old man stands watching. A kite with a smiling face flies overhead. The picture conveys the richness of traditional outdoor play and community life, inviting learners to identify games, count people, and relate the scene to their own play experiences.

reading.section_name: Picture Reading — Look at the picture and answer (items 1, 6, 7, 8) + Point out A

tasks_verbatim.task_text:
Look at the picture and answer.
1. Count how many there are and write in the blanks:
children ___, girls ___, boys ___, women ___ and animals ___
6. Who is reading the newspaper?
7. What are the children playing with?
8. What is the old man doing?
A. Point out the following in the picture.
1. The boys are playing with marbles.
2. A girl is playing hopscotch.
3. A boy and a girl are spinning tops.
4. A boy is blindfolded.
5. A boy is holding a kite.
B. Identify the playthings used to play. Write their names below.

question_bank.stem: Count and write: children ___, girls ___, boys ___, women ___ and animals ___.
What are the children playing with?
What is the old man doing?
Point out in the picture: The boys are playing with marbles / A girl is playing hopscotch / A boy and a girl are spinning tops / A boy is blindfolded / A boy is holding a kite.
Identify the playthings in the picture and write their names below the pictures.

visual_stimulus.brief_description: Full-page outdoor scene of children playing traditional games — marbles, hopscotch, spinning tops, blind man's buff, kite-flying — with women doing household tasks on a doorstep and an old man watching; a kite with a smiling face flies overhead.
Three small illustrations showing playthings from the picture: marbles (colourful spheres), a spinning top, and a skipping rope.

oracy.section_name: Picture Reading — Look at the picture and answer (items 2–5, 9–10)

tasks_verbatim.task_text:
2. What games are the children playing?
3. Children are playing in the open space in front of their houses. Where do you usually play?
4. Some children are not playing games. What are they doing?
5. There are some women in the picture. What are they doing?
9. What is your favourite game?
10. If you were in the picture, which game would you play?

question_bank.stem: What games are the children playing?
Children are playing in the open space in front of their houses. Where do you usually play?
Some children are not playing games. What are they doing?
There are some women in the picture. What are they doing?
If you were in the picture, which game would you play?

tasks_verbatim.task_text: B. Identify the playthings used to play. Write their names below.

question_bank.stem: Write the name of each plaything shown (marbles, top, skipping rope) below its picture.
